llmResponse.agenda_changes: Items 8.1, 8.2, and 8.3 (second readings on Board Policies 3320, 3516.5, and 5141) moved to consent agenda. Item 8.4 (Measure U addendum) moved to consent agenda. Item 7.6 pulled from consent items and brought back at future meeting. Item 6.6 removed from bond program consent items and brought back next time.
